evals.name: biomedical-eeg-adhd
evals.prompt: research-search — session folder is at Research/20260410_eeg-adhd-children/. Run the full literature search.
evals.expected_output: Searches all 4 sources (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, PubMed, arXiv). Deduplicates by DOI + fuzzy title. Runs snowball from top-cited seeds. Builds citation network with hub papers and clusters. Saves step2_raw_papers.json with 30-60 unique papers. Reports bilingual summary table.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json exists in the session folder

assertions.name: valid_json_structure
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json is valid JSON with 'papers' array and 'search_summary' object

assertions.name: paper_count_target
assertions.description: At least 20 unique papers in the papers array

assertions.name: metadata_completeness
assertions.description: Every paper has non-null title, authors, year, and abstract fields

assertions.name: doi_present
assertions.description: At least 70% of papers have a non-null DOI

assertions.name: multi_source_search
assertions.description: Papers come from at least 2 different sources (checked via sources_found_in or search_summary.sources)

assertions.name: deduplication_performed
assertions.description: search_summary shows total_raw_results > final_count, indicating dedup occurred

assertions.name: snowball_performed
assertions.description: At least one paper has found_via set to 'snowball'

assertions.name: citation_network_present
assertions.description: At least some papers have a citation_network field with in_degree/out_degree

assertions.name: hub_papers_identified
assertions.description: search_summary.hub_papers is a non-empty array

assertions.name: bilingual_summary
assertions.description: summary.md contains both English and Traditional Chinese text

assertions.name: config_updated
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json has current_step set to 2

assertions.name: includes_pubmed
assertions.description: For this biomedical topic, PubMed is included as a source

evals.name: cs-llm-program-repair
evals.prompt: 開始搜尋論文吧，session 在 Research/20260410_llm-automated-program-repair/
evals.expected_output: Adapts source selection for CS topic — skips PubMed, focuses on Semantic Scholar + OpenAlex + arXiv. Produces step2_raw_papers.json with valid metadata. Citation network analysis identifies clusters around LLM-based vs traditional APR methods.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json exists in the session folder

assertions.name: valid_json_structure
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json is valid JSON with 'papers' array and 'search_summary' object

assertions.name: paper_count_target
assertions.description: At least 20 unique papers in the papers array

assertions.name: metadata_completeness
assertions.description: Every paper has non-null title, authors, year, and abstract fields

assertions.name: doi_present
assertions.description: At least 70% of papers have a non-null DOI

assertions.name: multi_source_search
assertions.description: Papers come from at least 2 different sources

assertions.name: deduplication_performed
assertions.description: search_summary shows total_raw_results > final_count, indicating dedup occurred

assertions.name: snowball_performed
assertions.description: At least one paper has found_via set to 'snowball'

assertions.name: citation_network_present
assertions.description: At least some papers have a citation_network field with in_degree/out_degree

assertions.name: hub_papers_identified
assertions.description: search_summary.hub_papers is a non-empty array

assertions.name: bilingual_summary
assertions.description: summary.md contains both English and Traditional Chinese text

assertions.name: config_updated
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json has current_step set to 2

assertions.name: skips_pubmed
assertions.description: For this CS topic, PubMed should NOT appear in the sources used

assertions.name: includes_arxiv
assertions.description: arXiv is included as a source for this CS/AI topic

evals.name: cross-disciplinary-bci-depression
evals.prompt: I've just finished research-init for BCI depression treatment. Please proceed with the deep search. Session: Research/20260410_bci-depression-treatment/
evals.expected_output: Handles cross-disciplinary topic spanning neuroscience + engineering. Uses all 4 sources. Snowball search catches foundational BCI and depression papers. Citation clusters reflect the two camps (EEG-based vs fMRI-based neurofeedback). Bilingual summary.

assertions.name: output_file_exists
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json exists in the session folder

assertions.name: valid_json_structure
assertions.description: step2_raw_papers.json is valid JSON with 'papers' array and 'search_summary' object

assertions.name: paper_count_target
assertions.description: At least 20 unique papers in the papers array

assertions.name: metadata_completeness
assertions.description: Every paper has non-null title, authors, year, and abstract fields

assertions.name: doi_present
assertions.description: At least 70% of papers have a non-null DOI

assertions.name: multi_source_search
assertions.description: Papers come from at least 3 different sources (cross-disciplinary should hit more sources)

assertions.name: deduplication_performed
assertions.description: search_summary shows total_raw_results > final_count, indicating dedup occurred

assertions.name: snowball_performed
assertions.description: At least one paper has found_via set to 'snowball'

assertions.name: citation_network_present
assertions.description: At least some papers have a citation_network field with in_degree/out_degree

assertions.name: hub_papers_identified
assertions.description: search_summary.hub_papers is a non-empty array

assertions.name: citation_clusters_detected
assertions.description: search_summary.clusters contains at least 2 clusters with descriptive names

assertions.name: bilingual_summary
assertions.description: summary.md contains both English and Traditional Chinese text

assertions.name: config_updated
assertions.description: step0_session_config.json has current_step set to 2
